events.title: ICCA 2026
events.summary: Biennial ICCA Congress in Madrid bringing together global arbitration practitioners to examine pressing arbitration issues and developments.

events.title: YIAG Fireside Chat in Madrid
events.summary: Informal discussion event in Madrid organised by LCIA's Young International Arbitration Group covering international arbitration topics.

events.title: ICC Tokyo Arbitration Day
events.summary: One-day ICC arbitration event in Tokyo focusing on Asian arbitration trends and international commercial arbitration practice.

events.title: Prague Arbitration Day
events.summary: Annual one-day conference in Prague discussing arbitration developments in Central Europe and international arbitration practice.

events.title: YIAG Tylney Hall Symposium
events.summary: YIAG symposium organised by the London Court of International Arbitration focused on international arbitration topics for young practitioners.

events.title: London International Disputes Week 2026
events.summary: Seventh annual gathering of global international disputes community featuring 150+ events over five days. Theme: Tradition, trust and transformation in international dispute resolution. Expected 10,000+ attendees from 100+ countries.

events.title: LIDW Opening Reception
events.summary: Opening reception at Southwark Cathedral to launch London International Disputes Week, providing networking opportunities for international disputes professionals.

events.title: International Arbitration Day
events.summary: Opening event of London International Disputes Week 2026, focusing on international arbitration. Part of week-long gathering of global disputes community under theme 'Tradition, trust and transformation in international dispute resolution'.

events.title: Opening Reception
events.summary: Opening networking reception at Southwark Cathedral to launch London International Disputes Week 2026, bringing together international disputes community from over 100 countries.

events.title: LIDW Main Conference
events.summary: Primary LIDW conference for 700+ delegates covering international dispute resolution topics including arbitration, litigation and mediation with drinks reception.

events.title: LIDW NextGen Social at Boulebar
events.summary: Informal social networking event at Boulebar for junior and young-at-heart practitioners in international dispute resolution during LIDW.

events.title: Main Conference
events.summary: Main conference for over 700 delegates exploring tradition, trust and transformation in international dispute resolution. Covers arbitration, litigation and mediation with drinks reception and in-person/virtual attendance options.

events.title: LegalTech Showcase
events.summary: Technology showcase focused on legal technology solutions for international disputes resolution during London International Disputes Week.

events.title: LIDW Gala Dinner
events.summary: Formal gala dinner at Raffles London providing networking opportunity for international disputes community during LIDW.

events.title: LIDW NextGen Social at Boulebar
events.summary: Informal social networking event at Boulebar for junior and young-at-heart practitioners in the international disputes community during London International Disputes Week.

events.title: Gala Dinner
events.summary: Formal gala dinner at Raffles for London International Disputes Week delegates to network with international disputes community.

events.title: 43rd Cambridge International Symposium on Economic Crime
events.organiser: Cambridge International Symposium on Economic Crime
events.summary: Week-long symposium on economic crime at Jesus College, Cambridge. Full-week and day tickets available, including sessions, meals, cocktails, and optional accommodation. Programme covers economic crime topics with networking opportunities.

events.title: Dispute Resolution in the International Energy Business
events.summary: Two-day joint conference between LCIA and the Association of International Energy Negotiators examining dispute resolution mechanisms in international energy sector transactions and projects.
